_comment: WhatsApp Cloud API per-tenant credentials. Add these keys to each tenant's site_config.json (sites/<tenant>/site_config.json). Get all values from the Meta App dashboard at https://developers.facebook.com — System Users > WhatsApp Business Account > API Setup.
_setup_checklist: 1. Create a Meta Business account at business.facebook.com
2. Create a Meta App (Business type) at developers.facebook.com
3. Add the WhatsApp product to the App
4. Get a phone number — either Meta test number (free, limited) or migrate the gym's real number
5. Copy the Phone Number ID and WhatsApp Business Account ID from the API Setup screen
6. Create a permanent access token: System Users (in Business Settings) > Add System User > Add Assets (the WABA) > Generate Token — DO NOT use the temporary 24h token from the API Setup screen
7. Invent any random string for whatsapp_verify_token — Meta echoes it back during webhook verification
8. Get the App Secret from the App's Basic Settings — needed to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 on incoming webhooks
9. In the WhatsApp Configuration screen, set the Callback URL to the receive endpoint above and the Verify Token to whatever you put in whatsapp_verify_token
10. Click Verify and Save — Meta will GET /verify, our handler will echo the challenge if tokens match
12. Send a test message from your phone to the WhatsApp test number — should hit /receive within ~1 second
